name: Generate Function
prompt:
Write a Python function in a file called `workspace/merge_intervals.py`. The function `merge_intervals(intervals: list[list[int]]) -> list[list[int]]` should take a list of intervals [start, end] and merge all overlapping intervals. Return the merged intervals sorted by start time.

Examples:
  merge_intervals([[1,3],[2,6],[8,10],[15,18]]) => [[1,6],[8,10],[15,18]]
  merge_intervals([[1,4],[4,5]]) => [[1,5]]
  merge_intervals([]) => []
  merge_intervals([[1,4],[0,4]]) => [[0,4]]
